Portfolio

I’m Shane Moloney — Full Stack Engineer, Founder, and builder of reliable systems in Rust and cybersecurity.

Click any project for more details.

Featured Projects

### FestivalGrade – Festival Rating Website **Tech:** Angular + PostgreSQL | **Timeline:** March 2025 – May 2025 Fullstack festival rating platform featuring user reviews, Keycloak authentication, and content management features.
Technical details - Built with Angular frontend and PostgreSQL backend - Secure authentication using Keycloak - Content management system for festivals and reviews - Deployed on Hetzner VPS
### AI Detector – Open Source AI Email Detector **Tech:** Rust | **Timeline:** May 2025 – June 2025 Open-source tool for classifying emails using AI/ML techniques.
Technical details - KNN-based detection engine implemented in Rust - REST API backend - Server-side frontend built with Rust Hypertext - Fully containerized with Docker - Deployed on Hetzner Linux infrastructure
### Technical Content Creation **YouTube:** [@shanemoloney](https://youtube.com/@shanemoloney) | **May 2021 – June 2026** Created coding tutorials and technical guides on modern technologies with **10,000+ views**. Hosted live events with renowned developers such as **Herbert Wolverson**.
Topics & highlights - Rust, systems programming, and modern backend development - Practical tutorials and deep technical guides - Live coding sessions and community events
### TommyWhelan.com Website **Freelance** | January 2025 – March 2025 Responsive website for archival audio content.
Technical details - Deployed with Cloudflare hosting - Digitisation and publishing of archival audio content for public access - Fully responsive design

Other Projects & Interests

  • Full Stack development and community-driven projects at My Founder Mode Software Services (2025–Present)
  • Leadership of the successful release of Gridlock’s security-focused decentralised wallet (CTO role)
  • Mainframe modernisation and API interoperability work at General Motors
  • Coding tutorials and practical developer content on YouTube
  • Live events, DJing, and creative projects

Want to collaborate or discuss Rust, OT/IIoT security, or building reliable systems?

Reach out on LinkedIn or GitHub.
